title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank has brought to the senior citizens an account that can facilitate your banking transactions with hosts of facilities catering to the needs of the customer. This is deal in which you cannot just save the money but also make it grow by availing the auto Sweep Out / Sweep In facility.




Call on our Phone Banking numbers Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI bank offers a special Advantage Superior Account for the senior citizens by keeping their financial needs in mind and providing easy banking access facilities.
